obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (n source : Nat) (g : Graph), (dijkstra n source g).length = n
obligations.nl_gloss: The returned distance table has length n.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (n source : Nat) (g : Graph), source < n → (dijkstra n source g).get? source = some (some 0)
obligations.nl_gloss: The distance from the source to itself is zero.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (n source v : Nat) (g : Graph) (d : Nat), NonNegativeWeights g → (dijkstra n source g).get? v = some (some d) → ∀ d', PathWeight g source v d' → d ≤ d'
obligations.nl_gloss: When every edge weight is non-negative, if dist[v] == Some(d) then no path from source to v has weight less than d.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (n source v : Nat) (g : Graph) (d : Nat), (dijkstra n source g).get? v = some (some d) → PathWeight g source v d
obligations.nl_gloss: If dist[v] == Some(d), there exists a path from source to v with total weight d.

obligations.lean_statement: ∀ (n source v : Nat) (g : Graph), (dijkstra n source g).get? v = some none → ¬ ∃ d, PathWeight g source v d
obligations.nl_gloss: If dist[v] == None, there is no path from source to v.
